data.title: Binance Alpha Launches BROCCOLI (f2b), Broccoli (714), and Broccoli (f3b)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official interface, Binance Alpha launched BROCCOLI (f2b), Broccoli (714) and Broccoli (f3b)

data.title: OSL: Hong Kong is becoming a key hub between the mainland and international digital asset markets, playing a strategic role as a “super connector”
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: At WAVE 2025, in the discussion on "Asset Management and Wealth Opportunities in the Hong Kong Compliance Era", Tony Luk, head of OSL Wealth Management, said that Hong Kong is relying on its unique market positioning and policy advantages to become an important hub connecting mainland China and the international virtual asset market through the dual-track mechanism of "regulatory sandbox + licensing system". Under the strict compliance framework, Hong Kong not only provides mainland investors with a compliant channel to access virtual assets, but also provides policy certainty for overseas institutions to allocate Asia-Pacific assets, and is gradually confirming the strategic value of its "super contact person" role.

data.title: Broccoli (f3b) market value exceeds $70 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN market data shows that Broccoli (f3b) market value has exceeded 70 million US dollars, and is now reported at 73.2 million US dollars, with a 24-hour increase of 290%. 
Earlier news, Binance Alpha launched BROCCOLI (f2b), Broccoli (714) and Broccoli (f3b)

data.title: Caldera to launch ERA token, to be airdropped retroactively later this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ethereum Rollup deployment platform Caldera announced that it will launch the Caldera ecosystem native token ERA, which will be launched through retroactive airdrops later this year to accelerate the decentralization of the Caldera protocol and will play a key role in the Caldera ecosystem.

data.title: YZi Labs transferred 7 tokens worth $206,000 to Gate 4 hours ago
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, YZi Labs (formerly Binance Labs) transferred 7 tokens worth $206,000 to Gate 4 hours ago. Including: ULTI, OLE, MAVIA, SQR, NLK, PBUX, WNCG.
These tokens were obtained by YZi Labs through investment unlocking and attribution. The common point is that they all have YZi Labs investment but failed to be listed on Binance.

data.title: Currently, 86.2% of Binance users who participated in the vote support the launch of PI
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the data released by the official account of Binance Square, as of now, there are about 70,000 Binance users participating in the "Do you want Binance to launch PI" vote, of which 86.2% of users support the launch of PI.
Earlier news, Binance launched the "Do you want PI to be launched on Binance?" vote from 22:45 on February 17, 2025 to 07:59 on February 28, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8). The results will be updated daily on the official account of Binance Square, but users living in countries or regions such as mainland China will not be counted in the final valid voting results.

data.title: Virtual Protocol ecosystem tokens fell across the board, with VIRTUAL falling 8.6% in 24 hours
NEAR Network DefAI Platform Delta Trade Now Supports Solana Chain
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Delta Trade, a NEAR DefAI platform that supports multiple robot strategies and provides automated trading functions, now supports the Solana chain.
The main functions and features of the platform include: automatic buying and selling using grid robots, regular batch purchases through the DCA function, plans to launch a swing bot that takes advantage of market fluctuations, and preparations for multi-chain support through chain abstraction based on NEAR.
Delta Trade's current activities include: taking the lead in operating a points system on the Solana chain, accumulating points based on activities such as creating trading robots.
In addition, Delta Trade also supports user customization, adding new trading pairs on supported chains, performing DCA transactions of BTC/NEAR pairs on the NEAR chain, and its UI design is similar to the Windows XP interface.

data.title: Satoshi Ramp mainnet supports cross-chain transfer of BTC to NEAR network
AscendEX will list Hosky Token (HOSKY)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Hosky Token (HOSKY) at 23:00 on February 19, opening the HOSKY/USDT trading pair, and is now open for recharge.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%.
